Hero.subtitle: CSY Group is built for gold and crypto traders who want a structured way to read the market. Inside Discord, members get daily analysis, focused chat, and live sessions built around depth data and order-flow context.

About.label: About CSY Group
About.paragraph1: CSY Group is a Discord-based trading education community for traders who want more structure in gold and crypto markets. Our edge is depth data: reading how larger participants may be positioning, then translating that context into practical trade planning.
About.paragraph2: We don't rely on random indicators. We focus on order-flow context, positioning, and ATAS-style depth analysis to build structured trade plans with defined risk.

daily.title: Daily Analysis
daily.desc: Every day we break down market structure, identify key levels, and map out structured scenarios.

community.title: Community
community.desc: Real-time chat, Q&A, and trader-to-trader review in a focused Discord environment.

coaching.title: Live Coaching
coaching.desc: Tuesday to Thursday around 9PM with live decision-making and real-time execution walkthroughs.

flow.title: Flow Lens
flow.desc: Use ATAS-style depth data to understand liquidity, larger participant behavior, and positioning context.

Features.label: What Members Get
Features.subtitle: A structured learning environment for traders who want to improve market reading, planning, and review through live coaching and depth data analysis.

daily.title: Daily Market Analysis
daily.desc: Daily market analysis and idea sharing in Discord. We break down structure, identify levels, and discuss trade ideas.

live.title: Live Trade Sessions
live.desc: Live trade sessions from Tuesday to Thursday around 9PM with live decision-making and real-time execution review.

coaching.title: Technical Coaching
coaching.desc: Technical coaching during and beyond live sessions. Personal feedback on your entries, risk management, and trade reviews.

flow.title: Institutional Flow View
flow.desc: Market-flow view using ATAS-style depth data. Learn how liquidity and larger participant behavior can shape trade context.

Approach.label: Our Trading Approach
Approach.subtitle: We do not rely on random indicators. CSY focuses on depth data, order-flow context, and positioning behavior to build structured trade plans.

data.title: Data Read
data.desc: Track how liquidity and aggressive flow behave at key levels. Understand what the depth data is signaling before making a plan.

direction.title: Direction
direction.desc: Identify where larger participants may be building pressure. Use order-flow context to frame possible market direction.

execution.title: Execution
execution.desc: Turn data into entries, risk controls, and trade management. Plan entries with defined invalidation and target areas.

validation.title: Validation
validation.desc: Practice the same logic in live sessions and daily review. Refine your process through repetition and community feedback.

Evidence.label: ATAS-Style Chart Evidence
Evidence.subtitle: Inside our sessions, we combine chart structure with depth-style execution evidence. You will see bubble-style pressure areas and Cluster/Diamond-style context used to support trade planning.

bubble.title: Bubble Pressure + Reaction Zone
bubble.label: Bubble
bubble.description: Bubble-style pressure areas help highlight where meaningful volume may be clustering. Watch how price reacts at these zones before forming a trade idea.

cluster.title: Cluster Flow + Diamond Logic
cluster.label: Cluster
cluster.description: Cluster and Diamond-style context helps show where aggressive buying or selling may be meeting passive orders, adding detail to the execution plan.

CTA.subtitle: Join our Discord community and start learning how to read order-flow context, build structured trade plans, and review execution with discipline.

Footer.description: A Discord-based trading education community focused on depth data, order-flow context, and structured trade planning.
Footer.tagline: Precision Trading · Depth Data · Structured Planning
Footer.disclaimer: Educational content only. Trading involves risk and can result in losses. CSY Group does not provide financial advice or guarantee trading results.
